audit_items.proof_trace: The file contains zero traditional dynamic allocations (kmalloc/kzalloc/vmalloc); all allocations are debugfs dentries created via debugfs_create_dir/debugfs_create_file. These are managed hierarchically: local dentries (queues, rx, tx, xdp) are children of nn->debugfs_dir and freed atomically when nfp_net_debugfs_dir_clean calls debugfs_remove_recursive. Callers in nfp_net_main.c and nfp_netvf_main.c invoke dir_clean on both success and error paths, and nfp_net_debugfs_destroy handles the full tree at module unload.
